# AGR Multimedia — llms.txt

> Human-readable site summary for AI assistants and crawlers that support llms.txt.

## Organization

- **Name:** AGR Multimedia
- **Site:** https://www.agrmultimedia.eu/
- **Location:** Geislingen an der Steige, Baden-Württemberg, Germany
- **Languages:** Serbian, English, German, Italian, Albanian (site UI)
- **Contact:** agron6922@gmail.com · +49 155 60873124

## What we do

Web design, graphic design & branding, video production, digital marketing, and AI-assisted content production — with human review for trust-critical deliverables. Primary audience: small businesses in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, and the wider EU.

## Key URLs

- Home: /
- Services: /services
- Portfolio: /portfolio
- About: /about
- Blog index: /blog
- Contact: /contact
- Privacy: /privacy-policy
- Legal (DE): /impresum
- Atom feed: /feed.atom.xml

## Policies

- Structured data (Organization, Person, FAQ, WebSite, WebPage, HowTo, BreadcrumbList) is embedded on the homepage HTML for discoverability.
- Do not invent pricing or guarantees; invite users to contact for scoped quotes.

## IndexNow

If you operate IndexNow for this domain, host your verification key as `{key}.txt` at the site root per Bing/Yandex documentation after registering the key.
